arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: Serie A leaders Napoli face a tricky test on Sunday as they travel to Stadio Carlo Castellani to take on a stubborn Empoli side. The lunchtime clash pits Antonio Conte’s high-flying Partenopei against Roberto D’Aversa’s well-organized Azzurri in what promises to be an intriguing tactical battle. Napoli enter the match in imperious form, having won six of their last seven matches across all competitions. Their 3-1 victory over Como before the international break extended their unbeaten run to six games and kept them two points clear of reigning champions Inter Milan at the Serie A summit. arts.ttl: Napoli brace for Kvaratskhelia’s potential summer departure as contract talks stall
arts.sum: Napoli are coming to terms with the possibility of losing their star winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia in the upcoming summer transfer window. TMW report how contract renewal negotiations with the Georgian international have been ongoing for over a year, but an agreement remains elusive. Initially, there seemed to be progress when Napoli president Aurelio De Laurentiis traveled to Germany during Georgia’s national team camp. A proposal of around 5 million euros per year for a five-year contract was reportedly discussed. However, the latest meeting between the parties ended in a stalemate. arts.ttl: Antonio Conte urges caution amid Napoli’s strong start
arts.sum: Napoli manager Antonio Conte addressed the media ahead of his team’s upcoming Serie A match against Empoli, tempering expectations despite the club’s impressive start to the season. The former Chelsea and Inter Milan boss emphasized that Napoli is still in a rebuilding phase, cautioning against premature excitement. “We are still very much a work in progress,” Conte began. “It can’t be any other way after only three months, otherwise we’d be undervaluing the entire journey that needs to be undertaken in a reconstruction phase like ours.
